answer.title: Demo readiness review
answer.summary: The plan is directionally strong for demo, but it needs a clearer first action, visible agent heartbeat, and one measurable activation loop.
answer.body: Recommendation: keep the demo scope narrow. Show the user request, CMO reasoning boundary, Activity Stream progress, and final recommendation. Do not introduce Kanban or durable workflow yet.

diagnosis: The plan is aligned with demo readiness rather than production workflow.
The main gap is making the activation loop observable and measurable.
recommendations: Prioritize Activity Stream and Heartbeat visibility.
Keep Kanban out of the demo.
Use memory_suggestion for weak memory-worthy outputs.
risks: Adding durable workflow too early will blur the demo story.
Unsupported activation claims would weaken trust.
next_steps: Define the exact first action the demo user should take.
Show when CMO is waiting on Surf or Echo.

memory_suggestions.title: H1 demo uses Activity Stream before Kanban
memory_suggestions.reason: This boundary is likely useful for later implementation phases.
